stemHtml: Which statement about the range of VHF waves is correct?

options.a: It depends on the altitude of the aircraft and the elevation of the ground antenna.
options.b: It does not depend on the elevation of the antenna of the transmitter.
options.c: It does not depend on the altitude of the aircraft but only on the power of the transmitter.
options.d: Obstacles like mountains between transmitter and aircraft do not affect the range.
